name: Under-The-Sea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain pears and reserve 3/4 cup syrup.
2. Dice the pears and set aside.
3. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water, then add reserved syrup and lemon juice.
4. Pour mixture into an 8 x 4 inches loaf pan and chill until set but not firm (about 1 hour).
5. In a separate bowl, soften the cream cheese until creamy.
6. Slowly blend in the remaining gelatin, beating until smooth.
7. Add cinnamon and pears; spoon into the loaf pan.
8. Chill until firm for about 4 hours.
9. Unmold and garnish as desired.
